title: Bengali NLP Toolkit
description: Open-source preprocessing pipeline for Bengali text with tokenization, POS tagging, and stopword removal. Used by 200+ researchers with 1.2k GitHub stars.

title: Real-time Object Detector
description: YOLOv8-based detection model fine-tuned for Bangladeshi road scenes. Achieved 89% mAP on a custom annotated dataset of 8,000 images.

title: Fake News Classifier
description: BERT-based binary classifier trained on Bangla news articles achieving F1 score of 0.91 on a held-out test set of 3,000 samples.
